title: Users may be unable to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web
impact: Users may have been unable reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web.

updates.content:
Title: Users may be unable to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web

User impact: Users may be unable reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web.

More info: This issue may occur within any browser and would impact single reply and reply all.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Exchange Online and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Users may be unable to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web

User impact: Users may be unable reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web.

More info: This issue may occur within any browser and would impact single reply and reply all.
 
Current status: We're reviewing the diagnostic data provided by affected users to help determine our next troubleshooting steps.
 
Scope of impact: Users attempting to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook in the web may be impacted.
 
Next update by: Wednesday, April 15, 2026, at 11:30 PM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web

User impact: Users may be unable reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web.

More info: This issue may occur within any browser and impacts single reply and reply all. While we're focused on remediation, user testing indicates that by changing browser-specific pop-up settings to ensure that pop-ups are allowed, affected users may be able to avoid impact.

Current status: We've identified that a recent code change rolled out to address an unrelated issue affecting the reply button in Outlook on the web appears to be the source of impact. We're proceeding with additional investigation and analysis to verify our findings as we work towards developing a comprehensive fix to prevent further impact.

Scope of impact: Users attempting to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook in the web may be impacted.

Next update by: Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 9:30 PM UTC

Title: Users may be unable to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web

User impact: Users may have been unable reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook on the web.

More info: This issue may have occurred within any browser and impacted single reply and reply all functions. While we were focused on remediation, user testing indicated that by changing browser-specific pop-up settings to ensure that pop-ups were allowed, affected users may have been able to avoid impact.

Final status: We've confirmed through testing with a subset of affected users that the impact has been remediated. Affected users may need to refresh their Outlook on the web session to have the changes saturate.

Scope of impact: Users attempting to reply to email messages from a pop-up window in Outlook in the web may have been impacted.

Start time: Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 2:00 AM UTC

End time: Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 3:21 PM UTC

Root cause: A fix to address an unrelated issue introduced a code issue that’s leading to the impact.

Next steps: 
- We're reviewing offending fix to understand why impact to reply functionality wasn't caught during the testing phase. This will allow us to drive service improvements by proactively identifying similar issues in the future and improve our update testing processes.

This is the final update for the event.
